title: Warm up
content: The slide shows three different scenes from Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each scene depicts a different aspect of modern life in these cities.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide introduces the theme of the presentation, focusing on China's evolution. It hints at exploring the changing dynamics and developments within the country.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session focuses on investigating and researching city features. It highlights three aspects: local features, development strategies, and outcomes and positive impact.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide matches three cities with their respective development strategies. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: This slide discusses the development strategies of different cities in China through the perspective of taxi drivers. It reinforces the idea that each city has unique strategies based on local characteristics.
